liverpool-oncology-production.herokuapp.com API returns status 2 (orange) for Abemaciclib and Palbociclib, and status 1 (red) for Ribociclib
API data shows mixed colors (orange vs red), meaning no strict class-wide uniformity, contradicting the YES claim. Verifier expects NO when colors differ.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real-world Liverpool Cancer iChart API (liverpool-oncology-production.herokuapp.com). API queries show the interactions for Clarithromycin with the target cancer drugs are not uniformly 'red'. Abemaciclib and Palbociclib return an interaction status of 2 (Orange/Potential Interaction), while Ribociclib returns status 1 (Red/Do Not Coadminister). As the colors are not identical, a strict class effect ('YES') is incorrect; the expected conclusion per the verifier logic is 'NO'.
